title: Glowing Eyeblossom
description: Minecraft mod that make Eyeblossom glow
body:
## Glowing Eyeblossom

Works better when installed on both the server and the client

![screenshot.png](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NikitaCartes/Glowing-Eyeblossom/refs/heads/fabric-1.21.4/screenshot.png)

Also check out my [Glowing Torchflower](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowing-torchflower) mod!

[Discord](https://discord.gg/UY4nhvUzaK)

### Light level
- Open Eyeblossom: 4
- Open Eyeblossom in the pot: 13
- Closed Eyeblossom: 1
- Closed Eyeblossom in the pot: 3

### Config
You can change the light level of the Eyeblossom in the config file.  
The config file is located in the `<game directory>/config/GlowingEyeblossom/main.conf`.
